property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
D:\develop\java\jdk in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;D:\Download rc in\;D:\develop\java\jdk in;D:\【PC】@ATRI@;C;\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;D:\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;D:\develop\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\develop\Xshell\;D:\develop\Xftp\;D:\develop\wechat_app_develop\微信web开发者工具\dll;D:\develop\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Bamdow\AppData\Roaming
vm;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:	emp\Matlab in\win32;C:\Users\Bamdow\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\Bamdow\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\Bamdow\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\develop\Microsoft VS Code in;D:\develop\DevEco Studio in;;D:\AdvancedCodes\Bambow_web_project\cpolar\;C:\Users\Bamdow\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: featureComparison2

18:00:17.001 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bamdow.BackendApplicationTests]: BackendApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:00:17.092 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bamdow.BackendApplication for test class com.bamdow.BackendApplicationTests
